overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit elevated walkways, holographic advertisements on glass skyscrapers, and a transition from a lower enclosed path to an open rooftop terrace with palm trees. The footage is from Cyberpunk 2077 with high-fidelity graphics and atmospheric neon lighting.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along an elevated pathway illuminated by red neon floor lights

entered.detail: tall skyscraper covered in bright holographic advertisements with cyan and red neon colors
red neon light strips embedded in the walkway floor creating a glowing path forward
smooth gray concrete barrier wall running along the right side of the walkway
modern glass building facade with illuminated windows and structural lines

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking along a narrow elevated walkway in a futuristic city at night. Bright holographic advertisements cover a tall tower on the left, while a concrete wall runs along the right. Red neon lights illuminate the floor, creating a glowing path forward through the cyberpunk environment.

events.description: ascending ramp from lower walkway to upper rooftop level as concrete wall transitions to glass railing with palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking up a ramp transitioning from the enclosed lower walkway to the open rooftop terrace

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the upper rooftop level becoming visible over the descending wall
transparent glass safety railing replacing the solid concrete wall along the right side

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a ramp transitioning from the enclosed lower walkway to an open rooftop level. The concrete wall on the right gives way to a glass railing, revealing palm trees lining the upper terrace. The holographic towers remain visible on the left as the elevation increases.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop terrace with palm trees overlooking the city

events.description: approaching an illuminated building entrance with red lighting at the end of the rooftop terrace

agents.ego_description: walking along the rooftop terrace toward a building entrance framed by palm trees

entered.detail: modern building entrance with glass doors and red illuminated signage at the end of the terrace

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves along the open rooftop terrace lined with palm trees on both sides and a glass railing overlooking the city. The red neon floor lights have ended, replaced by standard paving. The camera approaches a building entrance with red illuminated signage at the terrace's end, while the holographic ad towers remain visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a narrow, enclosed cyberpunk walkway toward an open, elevated rooftop terrace. It begins by gliding along a path illuminated by red neon floor lights, flanked by a concrete wall and towering holographic advertisements. As the camera ascends a ramp, the concrete wall gives way to a glass railing, shifting the environment from a confined corridor to an open-air level lined with palm trees. The scene then expands across the rooftop terrace where the neon glow fades into standard paving, moving past the greenery while the holographic towers remain visible in the distance. Finally, the camera approaches a building entrance marked by red illuminated signage at the end of the terrace.
